Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

It looks like sanity test_600a is failing due to not being able to access one of the modified values:

 error: set_param: param_path 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb': No such file or directory
 error: set_param: setting 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb'='clear': No such file or directory
 error: get_param: param_path 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb': No such file or directory
 error: get_param: param_path 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb': No such file or directory
 lustre/tests/sanity.sh: line 32307: ((: == 100 : syntax error: operand expected (error token is "== 100 ")
 sanity test_600a: @@@@@@ FAIL: osc_unevict_cached_mb is , expected 100

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> It looks like sanity test_600a is failing due to not being able to access one of the modified values:
> 
>  error: set_param: param_path 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb': No such file or directory
>  error: set_param: setting 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb'='clear': No such file or directory
>  error: get_param: param_path 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb': No such file or directory
>  error: get_param: param_path 'osc/*osc*/osc_unevict_cached_mb': No such file or directory
>  lustre/tests/sanity.sh: line 32307: ((: == 100 : syntax error: operand expected (error token is "== 100 ")
>  sanity test_600a: @@@@@@ FAIL: osc_unevict_cached_mb is , expected 100

Yeah I didn't expect that it wanted to be really named osc_unevict_cached_mb. My bad. I will fix. Usually the macros are such that osc is dropped.
Uploaded patch set 2.

commit.subject: LU-8066 osc: migrate simple procfs files to sysfs
commit.message:
LU-8066 osc: migrate simple procfs files to sysfs

Move the remaining two simple procfs files for the osc layer
to sysfs.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: Iafcc507cab9309f809f850d356c350c2b969241e
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/57458
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
